title: Lowtown District
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Corint_map.jpg|thumb|Lowtown District on a map]]
'''Lowtown District''' was one of the areas of [[Corint City]], the planetary capital of [[Pirik]].

Lowtown District was the seedier area of the city, including most of the criminal life, cantinas, bars and probably the base of an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] unit, [[Shroud Team]].
